oos_validation.conclusion: System is NOT overfit - profitable out-of-sample

sharpe_investigation.conclusion: Negative Sharpe caused by 44% flat days + 4% risk-free rate penalty. System actually has excellent risk-adjusted returns.

signal_exit_profit_filter.result: Counterproductive - blocking losing signal exits caused trades to hit stops instead
signal_exit_profit_filter.conclusion: TF signal exits correctly identify reversals and cut losses early

position_sizing_sweep.sensitivity: System extremely sensitive - 0.75% risk causes DD to jump from 1.19% to 12.15%
position_sizing_sweep.conclusion: Conservative sizing is a feature, not a limitation
